login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Log in to continue your story.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.subtitle: Start writing your story today. It only takes a minute.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to choose a new password.
forgotPassword.sent: If an account exists for that email, we've sent a reset link. Check your inbox.

resetPassword.subtitle: Enter a new password for your account.
resetPassword.invalidLink: This reset link is invalid or has expired.

settings.title: Account settings
settings.nameSectionSubtitle: You can change your name once every 24 hours.
settings.nameCooldown: You can change your name again in {duration}.
settings.passwordSectionSubtitle: You can change your password once every 5 minutes.
settings.passwordCooldown: You can change your password again in {duration}.
settings.passwordMismatch: New passwords don't match — please check both fields.

storyForm.chronoError: Something went wrong — please try again.
storyForm.chronoDone: Done — your story has been reordered.

newStory.title: Write a new story
newStory.subtitle: Choose how you'd like to share, then write at your own pace.
newStory.freeformDesc: Write your story in your own words, at your own pace.
newStory.questionsDesc: Answer a few reflective questions to help others learn from your experience.
newStory.familyTreeDesc: Add relatives as bubbles and connect them to build out your family tree.
newStory.chooseDifferentWay: ← Choose a different way to write

editStory.title: Edit story
editStory.notFound: This story doesn't exist or isn't yours to edit.

home.eyebrow: Every life is a story worth telling
home.heroSubtitle: Liferecord is a warm, simple place where people can write and share their life stories — for family, for the world, and for generations to come.
home.feature1Desc: No complicated tools. Just a clean page where you can type your memories at your own pace.
home.feature2Desc: Send a link to loved ones so they can read, comment, and treasure your stories forever.
home.feature3Desc: Your stories are safely stored and available to those you choose, now and in the future.
home.step1Desc: Sign up in seconds — no complicated setup needed.
home.step2Desc: Use our gentle editor to write a story, big or small.
home.step3Desc: Choose who can read it — family only, or the whole world.
home.ctaSubtitle: Join Liferecord today and start turning your memories into stories that last.
